html:
The Grass Suit is the weakest wearable Armor, acting as an alternative to the Log Suit. It requires 10 Cut Grass and 2 Twigs to craft and is available from the beginning of the game.

A Grass Suit has 225 durability and absorbs 60% of physical damage. Not considering the armor's durability, the Grass Suit effectively adds 225 to the average survivor.

Also like the Log Suit, a Grass Suit can also be added to a Campfire or Fire Pit for fuel, even when its durability is nearly gone. Despite being acceptable fuel for Campfires and Fire Pits, a dropped Grass Suit will not catch fire.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Feathered Grass Armor and Woven Grass Armor skins were introduced during the official The Forge event in 2017.
Woven - Elegant
Forge Collection
Feathered Grass Armor
This delicately woven cloak is an excellent decorative piece.
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Forge Collection
Woven Grass Armor
Extra care and craftsmanship was put into weaving this grass armor.
See ingame

Trivia

  • The Grass Suit was added in the The End Is Nigh update.
  • A worn Grass Suit will make the sound of ruffling grass when walking.

"armorgrass"
“I hope there are no bugs in this.”
–Wilson
“A waste of flammable materials.”
–Willow
“Is prickly.”
–Wolfgang
“I prolong the inevitable.”
–Wendy
“THIS WILL ADD EXTRA PROTECTION TO MY METAL CASING.”
–WX-78
“Surprisingly effective with enough layers.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's better than nothing.”
–Woodie
“Direct confrontation is quite gauche.”
–Maxwell
“Grass prötectiön. It wön't last löng.”
–Wigfrid
“It just feels like more hair.”
–Webber
“How much protection can grass really provide?”
–Warly
“Friend hair made clothes”
–Wormwood
“Not at all useful.”
–Winona
“Protect oneself with a swish and a wish!”
–Wortox
“Swishy swish!”
–Wurt
“Smells like a freshly mowed lawn.”
–Walter
“Isn't there anything a bit more sturdy?”
–Wanda
The Grass Suit is the weakest wearable Armor, acting as an alternative to the Log Suit. It requires 10 Cut Grass and 2 Twigs to craft and is available from the beginning of the game.
A Grass Suit has 225 durability and absorbs 60% of physical damage. Not considering the armor's durability, the Grass Suit effectively adds 225 to the average survivor.
Also like the Log Suit, a Grass Suit can also be added to a Campfire or Fire Pit for fuel, even when its durability is nearly gone. Despite being acceptable fuel for Campfires and Fire Pits, a dropped Grass Suit will not catch fire.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bộ Đồ Cỏ là loại Áo Giáp yếu nhất có thể mặc được, đóng vai trò thay thế cho Bộ Đồ Gỗ. Nó cần 10 Cỏ Cắt và 2 Cành Cây để chế tạo và có sẵn ngay từ đầu trò chơi.

It requires 10 [[Cut Grass]] and 2 [[Twigs]] to craft and is available from the beginning of the game. A Grass Suit has 225 durability and absorbs 60% of physical damage. Not considering the armor's durability, the Grass Suit effectively adds 225 {{Hp}} to the average survivor.
